NOT_IN_VOICE: You must be in a voice channel to use this command.
NO_RESULTS: No results found for your query.
NO_PERMISSION: You don't have permission to use this bot.
STOPPED_PLAYBACK: Stopped playback and cleared the queue.
NO_PREVIOUS_SONG: There are no previous songs in the history.
ERROR_SAME_VOICE_CHANNEL: You must be in the same voice channel as me.
ERROR_COMMAND_EXECUTION: There was an error while executing this command!
LEFT_EMPTY: Leaving voice channel because it is empty.
QUEUE_ENDED: Leaving voice channel because the queue finished.
SEARCH_QUERY_TOO_LONG: Search query is too long. Maximum 200 characters allowed.
SEARCH_SESSION_ERROR: Failed to create search session. Please try again.
SEARCH_ERROR: An error occurred while searching. Please try again.
SEARCH_SESSION_EXPIRED: This search session has expired. Please start a new search.
SEARCH_NOT_YOUR_SESSION: You can only interact with your own search results.
SEARCH_INTERACTION_ERROR: An error occurred while processing your request.
SEARCH_PLAYER_STOPPED: The music player has been stopped. Please join a voice channel and start playing music to use search features.
LAVALINK_UNAVAILABLE: ❌ Music service is currently unavailable. Please try again in a few moments.
LAVALINK_TIMEOUT: ⏱ The search took too long to complete. The Lavalink node may be slow or busy — please try again.
LAVALINK_RECONNECTING: ⚠️ Music server connection lost. Reconnecting, please wait...
LAVALINK_PUBLIC_NODE_SWITCH: 🔄 Switching to a different music server...
GENERIC_ERROR: ❌ An error occurred while trying to play music. Please try again.
ABOUT_DESCRIPTION: BeatDock is a modern, open-source Discord music bot designed for high-quality audio playback and easy self-hosting.
QUEUE_JUMPED: ▶️ Jumped to **{0}** and removed all previous tracks from the queue.
QUEUE_JUMP_INVALID: ❌ Invalid track selection. The track may no longer exist in the queue.
AUTOPLAY_BLOCKS_ACTION: ❌ Disable autoplay first to use this action.
INVITE_DESCRIPTION: Click the button below to add BeatDock to your server.
WELCOME_DESCRIPTION: BeatDock is ready to play music! Use `/play` to get started, or `/about` to learn more.
LYRICS_NOT_FOUND: No lyrics found for this track.
FILTER_SELECT: Select a filter to apply or remove.
